name: Discussion
description: Product reviews, questions, answers, and moderation workflow.
author: Buyzilo

hooks.name: product.detail.render_discussion
hooks.description: Injects reviews and questions into the product detail layout.

hooks.name: admin.reviews.queue
hooks.description: Registers moderation workload surfaces for public discussion and review events.

dataGovernance.retentionNote: Discussion moderation settings are exportable; public review and thread records stay in application data and are not removed by addon cleanup.

prerequisites.label: Marketplace site name
